message:
🌱 Add opentofu: Allow Variable Validation Conditions to Refer to Other mission (#828)

Signed-off-by: Andy Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>

files.patch:
@@ -0,0 +1,72 @@
+{
+  "version": "kc-mission-v1",
+  "name": "opentofu-1336-allow-variable-validation-conditions-to-refer-to-other-variables",
+  "missionClass": "solution",
+  "author": "KubeStellar Bot",
+  "authorGithub": "kubestellar",
+  "mission": {
+    "title": "opentofu: Allow Variable Validation Conditions to Refer to Other Variables",
+    "description": "Allow Variable Validation Conditions to Refer to Other Variables. Requested by 54+ users.",
+    "type": "feature",
+    "status": "completed",
+    "steps": [
+      {
+        "title": "Check OpenTofu installation",
+        "description": "Verify your OpenTofu version:\n```bash\ntofu version\n```\nThis feature requires OpenTofu installed locally. Install via `brew install opentofu` or download from https://opentofu.org/docs/intro/install/."
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Understand the feature context",
+        "description": "### Use Cases\n\nI want to be able to have conditional validation on variables - the condition being the value of other variables."
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Apply the fix for Allow Variable Validation Conditions to Refer to Other\u2026",
+        "description": "GraphNodeReferenceOutside is a hack that allows variables to span the caller and callee of modules.  GraphNodeReferenceOutside checks are required to make sure the scope of variable evaluation is correct.\n## Target Release\n\n1.9.0"
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Verify the feature works",
+        "description": "Test that the feature is working as expected:\n```bash\ntofu version\ntofu validate\ntofu plan\n```\nConfirm that the feature described in \"Allow Variable Validation Conditions to Refer to Other Variables\" is functioning correctly."
+      }
+    ],
+    "resolution": {
+      "summary": "GraphNodeReferenceOutside is a hack that allows variables to span the caller and callee of modules.  GraphNodeReferenceOutside checks are required to make sure the scope of variable evaluation is correct.\n## Target Release\n\n1.9.0",
+      "codeSnippets": []
+    }
+  },
